name: welsh-sm
description: Predicate over (Lexeme, Environment): does this token exhibit Welsh soft mutation?

scripts.report:pdf: npm run report && pandoc REPORT.md -o REPORT.pdf --pdf-engine=/Library/TeX/texbin/lualatex --shift-heading-level-by=-1 --toc --toc-depth=1 -V mainfont='STIX Two Text' -V mainfontfallback='STIX Two Math:' -V monofont=Menlo -V monofontoptions=Scale=0.85 -V geometry:margin=2.5cm -V fontsize=11pt -V colorlinks=true -M date='July 2026'
